exec_args.query: SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table';

args.query:
SELECT "Index", 
       SUM(CASE WHEN "Close" > "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS up_days,
       SUM(CASE WHEN "Close" < "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS down_days,
       SUM(CASE WHEN "Close" = "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS flat_days,
       COUNT(*) as total_days
FROM index_trade
WHERE "Index" IN ('GSPTSE','IXIC','NYA')
  AND Date >= '2018-01-01' AND Date <= '2018-12-31'
GROUP BY "Index"
ORDER BY "Index";

exec_args.sql:
SELECT "Index", 
       SUM(CASE WHEN "Close" > "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS up_days,
       SUM(CASE WHEN "Close" < "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS down_days,
       SUM(CASE WHEN "Close" = "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS flat_days,
       COUNT(*) as total_days
FROM index_trade
WHERE "Index" IN ('GSPTSE','IXIC','NYA')
  AND Date >= '2018-01-01' AND Date <= '2018-12-31'
GROUP BY "Index"
ORDER BY "Index";

result.preview: "GSPTSE and IXIC had more up days than down days in 2018."

args.answer: GSPTSE and IXIC had more up days than down days in 2018.
